name: Seabridge Gold Inc.
description: Seabridge Gold Inc. is a major gold-copper developer focused on the KSM project in northwest British Columbia, one of the world's largest undeveloped gold-copper deposits with 47.3 million ounces of gold in proven and probable reserves. The project has all environmental approvals in place with a 33-year mine life and an After-Tax NPV of US$7.9 billion, and is advancing toward a production decision.
